column3: (Cache-control on Vercel static assets and redirects)
(Storable but non-cacheable on 307 redirects to apex/www)
(CDN edge cache on public HTML; index.html uses no-store)
(CSP wildcard on Vercel-hosted SPA static assets)
(Vercel static ACAO * on public assets; API CORS is app-controlled)
(COEP not required for this LMS deployment model)
